_comment: stdio Bus configuration for running the Registry Launcher as a worker pool
_description: This configuration demonstrates how to use the Registry Launcher to connect ACP clients to any agent in the ACP Registry through stdio Bus

pools._comment: Registry Launcher worker pool - routes messages to ACP Registry agents

limits._comment_max_input_buffer: Maximum size of input buffer per connection (1MB default)
limits._comment_max_output_queue: Maximum size of output queue per connection (4MB default)
limits._comment_max_restarts: Maximum number of worker restarts within restart_window_sec
limits._comment_restart_window_sec: Time window for counting restarts (60 seconds)
limits._comment_drain_timeout_sec: Timeout for draining connections during graceful shutdown
limits._comment_backpressure_timeout_sec: Timeout for backpressure before dropping messages
